SEARCH
Package qsim

Class Queue

java.lang.Object
qsim.Queue
public class Queue extends Object
A Queue object simulates a single screening lane.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Queue.Arrival
    Encapsulates the information about a customer and his progress through the screening lane
    static class 
    Queue.ArrivalBase

    lastBrokenLaneDelta
    From which broken lane (this+1 or this-1?) did we take a customer last time? (Sometimes the value can go beyond +1 or -1, if there are several broken lanes next to each other)

    Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)

    How many customers we will screen before taking a customer from an adjacent broken lane

    How many customers have been screened by each profile? These values sum to doneCnt

  • Field Details

    • NEVER

      static final long NEVER
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • para

      final Parameters para

    • myprofiles

      ScreenerProfile[] myprofiles
      All profiles supported by this lane's screening device

    • waiting

      LinkedList<Queue.Arrival> waiting
      Includes those waiting in line to be processed. The first element of the list may be currently being processed

    • ownPatronCnt0

      static final int ownPatronCnt0
      This parameter controls how frequently a working screening lane can accept customers from nearby broken lanes. (1 transfer accepted for each ownPatronCnt0 customers screened).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ownPatronCnt

      int ownPatronCnt
      How many customers we will screen before taking a customer from an adjacent broken lane

    • lastBrokenLaneDelta

      int lastBrokenLaneDelta
      From which broken lane (this+1 or this-1?) did we take a customer last time? (Sometimes the value can go beyond +1 or -1, if there are several broken lanes next to each other)

    • completed

      Vector<Queue.Arrival> completed
      Those whose processing has been completed already

    • pending

      Queue.Arrival pending
      The one not in queue yet.

    • genCnt

      int genCnt
      How many customers have been generated by the arrival generator

    • arvCnt

      int arvCnt

    • allCnt

      int allCnt
      Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)

    • detectedCnt

      int detectedCnt
      Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)

    • missedCnt

      int missedCnt
      Counting screened customers (all; detected threat; missed threat)

    • currentProfileID

      int currentProfileID
      Points to a position in myprofiles

    • screenedCntByProfile

      int[] screenedCntByProfile
      How many customers have been screened by each profile? These values sum to doneCnt

    • sched

      StaticArrivalSchedule sched
      This is used if we're using a pre-computed arrival schedule, loaded from a file.

  • Constructor Details

    • Queue

      Queue(Parameters _para, long now, Qsim _parent, int _mypos, StaticArrivalSchedule _sched)
      Creates a new lane, to be included into a Qsim object.
      Parameters:
      _parent - The Qsim object part of which this lane is. This Qsim object contains an already allocated array _parent.lanes, part of which this lane will be. This is needed to access adjacent broken lanes.
      _mypos - Where this queue will sit in _parent.lanes.

  • Method Details

    • waitingCnt

      int waitingCnt()

    • queueLength

      double queueLength()
      Different ways of measuring the queue length: with or without the customer currently being screeened

    • doneCnt

      int doneCnt()
      Same as allCnt

    • isBroken

      public boolean isBroken()

    • setBroken

      public void setBroken(boolean b)

    • isIdle

      boolean isIdle()

    • nextArrivalTime

      final long nextArrivalTime(long now)
      Generates the arrival time of the next customer in this line, using the Poisson distribution with the pre-set lambda (which itself may be a function of time). Used for arrival list generation.

    • finishedGeneration

      boolean finishedGeneration()
      Switch this queue to using a pre-created (static) arrivals schedule (probably, read from a file), instead of generating arrival times dynamically.

    • nextArrival

      Queue.Arrival nextArrival(long now)
      Returns a newly generated Arrival object, or null (if all planned arrivals have already been generated). The arrival data are obtained from a pre-read arrival schedule file (if we're using them on this run), or are generated on-the-fly as per the Poisson distribution.

    • generateAllArrivalTimes

      Queue.ArrivalBase[] generateAllArrivalTimes()
      Prepares the list of para.nGenMax arrival times, to save in a file for use in a future run

    • findNextActivityTime

      long findNextActivityTime()
      Looks up the next event in this lane that needs to be attended to.
      Returns:
      Time of that event, or NEVER if none is expected

    • describeQueue

      public String describeQueue()
      Who's in line?

    • describeQueue2

      public String describeQueue2(boolean html, int maxlen)
      Parameters:
      maxlen - If positive, truncate the description to approximately this length

    • giveOnePatron

      Queue.Arrival giveOnePatron()
      Checks if this lane wants to give its first customer to another lane. For this to happen, this lane should be broken, should have customers in its queue, and the first customer should not be being processed at this lane (as the last customer who is still processed by the already-broken lane). If it does, removes the first waiting customer from the queue and returns it.

    • handleImmediateArrival

      boolean handleImmediateArrival(long now)
      If a customer arrives right now, handle that
      Returns:
      true if an arrival indeed took place

    • handleImmediateScreeningCompletion

      boolean handleImmediateScreeningCompletion(long now)
      Completes a screening if it's happening right now

    • handleIdle

      boolean handleIdle(long now)
      If this lane is idle but there is work to do (here or at a broken neighbor), engage it into this work
      Returns:
      true if a new screening indeed starts
